composition.Programmer 1:
Set up the Python web application framework and project structure
- Initialize the project with necessary folders (e.g., 'data', 'templates', 'static').
- Configure the web server to run locally on port 5000.
- Ensure routing is set up to serve the Dashboard as the first page.
- Prepare data loading utilities to parse and manage data files with '|' delimiter.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop the Dashboard page
- Implement the Dashboard page with container and summary of total exhibitions.
- Add navigation buttons with specified IDs  artifact-catalog-button, exhibitions-button, visitor-tickets-button, virtual-events-button, audio-guides-button.
- Ensure the Dashboard displays correctly as the landing page.
composition.Programmer 3:
Develop the Artifact Catalog page
- Create artifact-catalog-page container.
- Implement artifact listing with filtering capabilities by artifact ID.
- Add buttons for actions such as viewing or editing artifacts.
- Include navigation back to Dashboard.
composition.Programmer 4:
Develop the Exhibitions page
- Implement exhibitions-page container with exhibition-list table.
- Display exhibition title, type (Permanent, Temporary, Virtual), and status.
- Add apply-exhibition-filter button.
- Add view-exhibition-button-{exhibition_id} for each exhibition.
- Include back-to-dashboard navigation.
composition.Programmer 5:
Develop the Exhibition Details page
- Display exhibition-title, exhibition-description, exhibition-dates.
- Show exhibition-artifacts table listing artifacts in the exhibition.
- Add back-to-exhibitions navigation.
composition.Programmer 6:
Develop the Visitor Tickets page
- Implement visitor-tickets-page container.
- Add ticket-type dropdown (Student, Family, Standard, VIP).
- Add number-of-tickets input.
- Add purchase-ticket-button.
- Display user's tickets in a table.
- Include back-to-dashboard navigation.
composition.Programmer 7:
Develop the Virtual Events page
- Create container for virtual events.
- Display event-list table with title, date, registration count.
- Add register-event-button-{event_id} for each event.
- Include back-to-dashboard navigation.
composition.Programmer 8:
Develop the Audio Guides page
- Implement audio-guides-page container.
- Display table of audio guides with exhibit title, language, duration.
- Add language filter dropdown and filter button.
- Include back-to-dashboard navigation.
composition.Programmer 9:
Implement data management and persistence
- Ensure all pages read and write data correctly from/to the 'data' directory files.
- Use '|' delimiter for parsing.
- Isolate data access for efficient retrieval and updates.
composition.Programmer 10:
Write integration and unit tests for all pages and functionalities
- Verify the web server runs on port 5000 and the Dashboard is the first page loaded.
- Test the presence and correctness of all required elements on each page (IDs, buttons, tables, dropdowns).
- Validate navigation flows between pages.
- Test data loading and filtering functionalities.
- Confirm data integrity and correct display based on example data.
- Document each test clearly describing the requirement it verifies.
